title: Chapter 46: The Hell Gate
content: Three days passed in uneasy silence.
The First Seat had withdrawn from the Council chamber. It had not been seen or sensed since the confrontation at Blackwood. Some thought it had fled. Others knew better.
It was preparing.
"The First Seat is not going to accept defeat," Silas said. "It cannot. It has been the dominant power for forty thousand years. Surrender is not in its nature."
"What will it do?"
"The only thing left. It will open the Hell Gate."
"The Hell Gate?"

"The original seal at the bottom of the Nether-Grid. The one that separates the ordered layers from the primordial chaos beneath them. The First Seat was its guardian. If it opens the gate, everything below will rise."
"What's below?"
"The things that predate the Primordials. The things that the First Seat sealed away when it built the Exchange. The original chaos that the Void was born from."
Roxanne was quiet for a moment.
"And if those things rise?"
"They will consume the Nether-Grid. Then the surface world. Then everything."
"So the First Seat would rather destroy everything than lose control."
"Yes."
She looked at her empty hand. The card was gone. The infinite wealth was gone. But the Void was restored.
"Then we stop it before it opens the gate."
"We can't. The gate is in the 11th Layer's deepest vault. Only the First Seat can access it."
"Then we go to the 11th Layer."
"That is suicide."
"Good thing I've never been good at self-preservation."
